title: Just Leash
description: JustRope is a simple but useful utility mod designed to give players more flexibility with leads and connections in Minecraft.
body:
### JustLeash - Advanced Lead Mechanics

![Avaliable For Forge !](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0d5c0ffc2748524742470222a6ee7699266e7174.png)

** JustLeash is a lightweight utility mod designed to expand and refine how leads work in Minecraft. While the vanilla lead system is functional, it often feels limited. This mod aims to provide players with more control and flexibility when handling entities, making it an essential tool for farmers, builders, and adventurers alike.
**
 **📖How to use
 1. Walk up to a Mob
 2. Right click on it while holding a lead
 3. You have now leashed a Mob!**

 Key Features
 Multi-Loader Support: Built with the Architectury API, ensuring seamless performance across Fabric, Quilt, Forge, and NeoForge.
 
 Enhanced Compatibility: Designed to work with Minecraft versions from 1.20.1 up to the latest 1.21.x releases.
 
 Reliable Mechanics: Focuses on stabilizing lead connections to prevent accidental breaks and improving the overall interaction with various entities.
 
 Why use JustLeash?
 Unlike complex overhaul mods, JustLeash stays true to the vanilla feel of Minecraft. It doesn't add unnecessary clutter to your game; instead, it optimizes existing mechanics to make your gameplay smoother. Whether you are transporting livestock across long distances or securing pets at your base, this mod ensures the process is intuitive and hassle-free.
 
 Current Status & Updates
This project is actively maintained. I am committed to:
 
 Providing timely updates for new Minecraft versions.
 
 Improving mod compatibility based on community feedback.
 
 Fixing any reported bugs to ensure a stable experience.
